Fig. 7. Linear probe top 1 accuracy per epoch, varying the bandwidth parameter.

Fig. 1. Hyperspherical Density Shaping workflow. An input image is augmented into multiple views, encoded, and explicitly projected onto the hypersphere SD−1. Top (Purple): The local differential entropy (Hlocal) is minimized by estimating the vMF density across positive pairs P(i) to enforce view-invariance. Bottom (Red): The global differential entropy (Hglobal) is maximized by estimating the vMF density across the entire batch B to prevent origin collapse and enforce deep space expansion. The final objective balances these forces using hyperparameters α and β.
Fig. 8. Linear accuracy over epochs by changing the β weight (above). Below, a zoom in, highlighting the curves for β = 0.1 (red, final accuracy higher) and β = 0.75 (blue, final accuracy lower).
